EPIC ATTRACTIONS

Discover a world of high-flying excitement with our state-of-the-art attractions designed for all ages.

Trampolines

Wall-to-wall bouncing fun for everyone.

Dodgeball

Ultimate team challenges on trampolines.

Ninja Course

Test your strength and agility.

Foam Pit

Soft landings for your biggest tricks.

Kids Zone

Safe play area for our smallest jumpers.

Climbing Wall

Reach new heights on our vertical walls.

BIRTHDAY
PARTIES

Celebrate with us!

  • ✔ Jump time included for all guests
  • ✔ Private table & dedicated host
  • ✔ Pizza, drinks, and party favors
